summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned because this shard is not a dedupe cluster, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, low-signal closeout is disabled, and security-sensitive PRs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling.

actions.reason: Non-mutating independent classification is the conservative plan when live preflight details are missing.
The PR is a real candidate but has a failing check and proof/status concerns; keep for maintainer review rather than close or merge.
